channel.title: Biometric on Ventryx – Visitor & Attendance Management Software India
channel.description: Recent content in Biometric on Ventryx – Visitor & Attendance Management Software India

item.title: Biometric vs Mobile App Attendance: Which Is Right for Your Business in 2026?
item.description: Walk into almost any office building in India today and you will find a biometric device at the entrance - that rectangular box with the fingerprint scanner that employees have been pressing their thumbs against for the past decade. It is so familiar that most companies assume it is the default answer to attendance tracking. But in 2026, with hybrid work now a permanent feature at thousands of Indian companies, that assumption deserves a second look.
